categories.name: Existence & Completeness
evidence: No production stub/empty functions found in backend scope; all 132 backend modules imported successfully.

evidence: pytest backend/tests -q: 1982 collected, 1976 passed, 5 skipped, 1 failed; slowest call was 5.00s.

evidence: locust, memory-profiler, and other load tooling missing; no meaningful backend load run completed.

evidence: Chaos scenarios not executed in this backend-only pass.

evidence: 1M dedup / 60K ingest / API concurrency scale probes not run in backend-only pass.

categories.name: Governance & Security
evidence: Full backend test suite includes security/auth/tamper/guard coverage and passed except one wiring assertion.
Quick local pattern sweep found only expected env/token references, not obvious hardcoded credentials.
trufflehog and gitleaks are not installed, so secret scanning remains unverified.

findings.detail: Infrastructure/training metrics split assertion fails because CRITICAL_METRICS also includes GPU runtime metrics.
GPU runtime metrics are included in CRITICAL_METRICS but not in INFRASTRUCTURE_METRICS or TRAINING_ONLY_METRICS, which breaks the backend wiring audit expectation.

blockers: Coverage collection via pytest-cov fails on this machine with PermissionError scanning C:\Users\Unkno.
Static analysis tools are missing from the venv: ruff, flake8, pylint, mypy, pyright, radon, vulture, bandit, semgrep, locust, memory-profiler.
trufflehog and gitleaks are not installed, so the requested secrets scan could not be run.
